base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of codec_portraits — a ui (dialog) from 1998 metal gear solid. Codec-call portraits — Snake + Mei Ling + Campbell + Naomi + Otacon + Meryl + Liquid etc.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Codec-call portraits — Snake + Mei Ling + Campbell + Naomi + Otacon + Meryl + Liquid etc.
